Name: curvature_aware_routing
Title: Curvature-Aware Precision Routing for Efficient Neural Network Inference
Short Hypothesis: By leveraging curvature-aware precision routing and training-free representation geometry, we can significantly improve the efficiency of neural network inference while maintaining accuracy, especially in resource-constrained environments.
Related Work: Existing work on precision routing and neural network pruning has focused on heuristic-based approaches, often lacking formal guarantees on stability and generalization. Our proposal distinguishes itself by incorporating spectral quantization theory and deterministic optimization proxies to provide a more rigorous and efficient framework.
Abstract: We propose a novel curvature-aware precision routing framework for efficient neural network inference. By integrating training-free representation geometry and spectral quantization theory, our approach provides a rigorous and efficient way to optimize neural network precision while maintaining accuracy. Our framework prioritizes mathematical transparency, numerical stability, and computational overhead bounds, making it highly feasible for single-GPU validation. We evaluate our approach on a range of benchmarks, demonstrating significant improvements in efficiency and accuracy compared to existing methods.
Experiments: Evaluate the proposed framework on ImageNet and CIFAR-10 benchmarks
Compare the performance of our approach with existing precision routing and pruning methods
Conduct ablation studies to quantify the impact of curvature-aware routing and spectral quantization on efficiency and accuracy
Investigate the applicability of our framework to other neural network architectures and tasks
Risk Factors and Limitations: The proposed framework may require significant modifications to existing neural network architectures and training protocols
The use of spectral quantization theory may introduce additional computational overhead
The framework's performance may be sensitive to the choice of hyperparameters and optimization algorithms
